channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Yamaha TRB5 1992 - Trans Red'5 string — $2,100
item.description:
$2,100 · Very Good · Smith Gear Shop

Sweet 1992 Yamaha TRB5P'with Red Trans finish'Flamed maple top and back'Ebony fretboard'Yamaha preamp with the Famous'Piezo,'it's in excellent condition'with a tiny nick on the finish shown other than that just some swirling on the finish'it actually looks amazing for its age you won't be disappointed'comes with a MONO' gig bag in excellent condition. Call or text 786-538-4371 for any additional info'

item.title: Aria Pro II Cliff Burton Signature 2007-2026 - Black — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · John collection outlet

Aria Pro II Cliff Burton Signature– MIJ Neck-Through Bass

Up for sale is a rare Aria Pro II Cliff Burton, a highly sought-after Japanes

This model, Cliff Burton signature release, making it a unique and collectible piece for serious players and fans.

Key Features:

• Made in Japan (MIJ)

• Neck-through-body construction (excellent sustain & stability)

• 7-piece maple/walnut neck with ebony fingerboard

• Ash body wings

• MB-1E dual-coil pickup

• Active B.B. Circuit with 6-position tone selector

• Passive bypass switch

Tone:

Powerful, punchy low end with strong midrange growl and excellent clarity. The 6-position rotary selector offers a wide range of tones—from deep and warm to aggressive and cutting.

Condition:

Perfect condition like New, saved in a collector collection. Just present a small chip (smaller than an US dime, check on pics)

Includes:

Hard case

A rare find—perfect for collectors, studio work, or live performance.

For shipping to USA. I'll use DHL express (means your guitar will arrive after 3-5 days when u purchase it)

This is because the tariff imposed by USA government.

For other countries I'll use EMS express mail service

item.title: Aria Pro II SB1000 JT2 - John Tyler signature Duran Duran extremely Rare and super LIMITED — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Excellent · John collection outlet

Aria Pro II

SB1000 JT2 - John Tyler signature Duran Duran ultra super limited and rare

Up for sale is a rare and highly sought-after Aria Pro II SB1000 JT2 - John Tyler signature Duran Duran .

This is not your average Aria — SB1000 JT2 - John Tyler sits at the very top of the lineup

Made In Japan.

Is the signature for John Tyler Duran Duran

Key Features:

• Neck-through-body construction (massive sustain & resonance)

• 7-piece maple/walnut neck

• Dual humbucker pickups

• Active/passive electronics with versatile tone shaping

• Ebony fingerboard (fast, smooth feel)

• Classic SB body design

• black hardware gotoh

• bridge

• machine head

Tone:

Deep, powerful low end with clear highs and strong punchy mids. From funk to rock to metal, this bass cuts through the mix effortlessly.

Condition:

Mint condition - has been in the collection of a collector in Japan, is really mint condition, everything is original

Includes a hard case

Why this bass?

The SB1000 JT2 is one of the rarest and most desirable Aria models ever made. Comparable to high-end boutique basses, with vintage Japanese build quality that’s getting harder to find every year.

Some serious collector haven't seen any yet.

Perfect for collectors, studio players, or anyone looking for a serious instrument with history and character.

For shipping to USA. I'll use DHL express (means your guitar will arrive after 3-5 days when u purchase it)

This is because the tariff imposed by USA government.

For other countries I'll use EMS express mail service

item.title: Lakland Skyline 55-02 Standard — $1,750
item.description:
$1,750 · Very Good · Marcaelis's Gear Locker

Professional Lakland Skyline Series 5-string bass guitar has a black gloss finish body. The instrument features a maple neck with a maple fretboard and block inlays. It is equipped with a J-style neck pickup and an MM-style bridge pickup. The hardware includes a chrome bridge and Hipshot-style tuners. This bass has five control knobs and a toggle switch for versatile tone shaping.

item.title: Guild Starfire II Bass — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Excellent · Lerm Galieu

The below description is from Guild’s site. This is a great bass, very lightly used.

The Starfire Bass II is a dual-pickup semi-hollow bass guitar that adds sonic options to one of Guild’s most iconic models, the Starfire Bass. The Starfire Bass II originally debuted in 1967, shortly after the single-pickup version, and quickly garnered a following that included Jack Casady (Jefferson Airplane) and Phil Lesh (Grateful Dead). The addition of the BiSonic BS-1 neck pickup on the Starfire Bass II gives bassists a warmer, smooth sound for added tonal flexibility. This double cutaway bass guitar features an arched laminate mahogany top and back, and mahogany sides, dual Guild BS-1 pickups, individual volume, tone, and master volume knobs, and a pickup selector switch. A clear, high gloss finish highlights this bass guitar’s natural beauty. The Starfire Bass II brings Guild’s vintage vibe to the modern bass player.

item.title: G&L Tribute Series L-2500 5 String w/ Rosewood Fingerboard — $675
item.description:
$675 · Very Good · AZ Doug's Gear

G&L L-2500 5 string bass guitar. In decent shape but it does have its share of dings and wear. PLEASE REVIEW ALL PICTURES. The electronics work on the bass as they should. A good looking bass despite the wear. I have replaced the tuners with G&L USA tuners, you can see in the pictures where they are not exactly same size from the stain mark. There are head stock pictures with old and new tuners. I will include the old ones Has been setup and plays great. I just don't do 5 string anymore. i have a hard case that fits it . I will update after I go thru my cases. Any questions please ask. Make an offer today!

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Joe Dart III 2024 - Present - Velvet Natural — $5,000
item.description:
$5,000 · Excellent · Evan's Gear Outlet

Limited edition Ernie Ball Music Man Joe Dart III - 30" short scale P Bass.

Used in near mint condition. Straight neck, level frets. This bass is a short scale masterpiece...nothing like it. Ships with the original Mono Vertigo gig bag.

#27 of 50


Price is firm due to rarity.

item.title: 1992 Fender Custom Shop '62 Jazz Bass - Early John Page Era - Rare Ash/Rosewood - MINT — $8,301.11
item.description:
$8,301.11 · Very Good · SAYUの機材アウトレット

Overview

Completed on April 16, 1992. This is an incredibly rare 1992 Fender Custom Shop '62 Jazz Bass from the "Early Golden Era" under the supervision of John Page. I am offering this from my private collection to a discerning player or collector who understands the historical value of this masterpiece.

Asset Value

• Early Custom Shop (Old Logo): This is the top-tier grade from the era before the Master Built system was established. During this time, the Custom Shop had access to a more luxurious selection of premium tonewoods, and each instrument was handcrafted with the same passion as today's Master Built series. Many enthusiasts believe the quality from this period even surpasses current Master Built offerings.

• Rare Specs: While most '62 reissues feature alder, this specific unit was custom-ordered with a Heavy Ash body. The powerful, dynamic grain on the back proves the exceptional quality of the wood.

• Complete Accessories: It remains in miraculous condition, complete with the legendary Certificate of Authenticity signed by John Page, original manual, tool kit, and bridge covers.

Sound & Feel (Personal Review)

• Deep, Majestic Tone: It has that unmistakable "Fender Sound" but with a depth and richness unique to the early Custom Shop.

• Incredible Response: The instrument reacts faithfully to every movement, from picking dynamics to the subtle pressure of your fretting fingers. The range of nuance it provides is truly unparalleled.

• Exceptional Neck Rigidity: Having owned several CS basses, the stability and feel of this neck are in a class of their own. Even a light pluck causes the entire body to resonate so intensely that you can feel the vibrations deep in your core.

• The Magic of Ash & Rosewood: It possesses the "sexiness" of a rosewood fingerboard while the heavy ash body perfectly tames the mid-range frequencies. It is a one-of-a-kind tone that combines tight, punchy power with elegant smoothness.

Specifications

• Date of Manufacture: April 16, 1992

• Weight: Approx. 4.9kg (10.8 lbs). This dense ash is the source of its thunderous sustain and heavy-duty low end.

• Included: Original Tweed Case, COA, Manual, Tool Kit.

Condition

This is a near-mint example for an instrument over 30 years old. Electronics are perfect, and there is plenty of room in the truss rod.

I have cherished this bass for a long time. I am in no rush to sell and am looking for the right owner who truly appreciates its value and soul.


■ Proof of Authenticity (Internal Photos)

• Matching Dates: The neck heel is stamped April 8, 1992, perfectly matching the completion date on the Certificate of Authenticity (April 16, 1992).

• Original Electronics: The control cavity reveals 100% original wiring with high-grade CTS pots and vintage-style cloth wires. No modifications have been made, preserving the authentic early Custom Shop tone.

• Hand-Signed details: You can see the hand-written markings and "Custom Shop" stamps inside the neck pocket and body, proving its handcrafted origin during the John Page era.

item.title: Freedom Custom Guitar Research Retrospective JB - Rare Ash/Rosewood - 3.965kg - MIJ made in japan — $2,269.84
item.description:
$2,269.84 · Very Good · SAYUの機材アウトレット

Freedom Custom Guitar Research (FCGR) Retrospective Series JB

A truly exceptional instrument that perfectly balances vintage tone, modern playability, and stunning aesthetics. This Retrospective JB features a rare wood combination and custom professional specs, hand-crafted in Tokyo, Japan.

Key Highlights:

• Rare Tonewood Combination: Features an Ash body with a Rosewood fingerboard. This combination offers the quick, punchy response of Ash paired with the warm, rich mid-range of Rosewood—truly the best of both worlds.

• Lightweight & Balanced: Weighing in at only 3.965kg (approx. 8.74lbs), this bass is comfortable for long sessions while maintaining a solid, resonant foundation.

• Unique Finish: Finished in a beautiful Custom Order Burgundy Mist/Pink. The body features FCGR’s signature ultra-thin poly finish—so thin you can feel the natural grain of the Ash wood, similar to an oil finish. The neck is finished in lacquer for a smooth, vintage feel.

• Vintage Tone with Modern Precision: The sound is fast and articulate yet deeply rooted in classic vintage tones. It sits perfectly in a mix, providing both a supportive low-end and a clear, sophisticated mid-range that is unmistakably FCGR. It is incredibly responsive to your picking dynamics.

• Professional Player Upgrades: * Equipped with a thick clear pickguard for enhanced slap/pluck playability and a modern look.

• Custom Truss Rod Access: Unlike standard Retrospective models that require pickguard removal for adjustments, this pickguard has been professionally modified to allow easy truss rod access while installed.

• Maintenance-Free Frets: Features FCGR’s renowned Stainless Steel Frets, ensuring a lifetime of smooth playing without the need for fret leveling or replacement.

Condition:

Excellent condition with superb playability. The neck is straight, and the stainless steel frets show zero wear.

Specifications:

• Body: Ash (Ultra-thin Poly finish)

• Neck: Maple / Rosewood Fingerboard (Lacquer finish)

• Weight: 3.965kg

• Frets: FCGR Stainless Steel

• Joint: Traditional 4-bolt

item.title: Provision Guitar Custom PJ - Top-Tier MIJ Quality - Ultra-Stable Neck - Maple Board — $2,269.84
item.description:
$2,269.84 · Very Good · SAYUの機材アウトレット

Provision Guitar Custom PJ: The Ultimate Tool for the Professional Player

Up for sale is a Custom PJ bass from Provision Guitar, one of Japan’s most respected boutique workshops. Known among top-tier Japanese session pros—especially those with a love for vintage tone—Provision instruments are celebrated as the "ultimate professional tools."

The Legendary Provision Neck:

Provision is famous for having some of the most stable necks in the industry, and this bass is a perfect example.

• Reliability: Since its initial professional setup, the neck has remained perfectly straight, maintaining a comfortable low action without any need for further adjustment.

• Truss Rod: The truss rod has nearly 100% of its adjustment range remaining, ensuring decades of reliability.

• Feel: Despite its incredible strength, the neck profile is remarkably comfortable and never feels "bulky" or cumbersome.

Expressive Tone & Response:

This is not just a standard PJ; it is a highly sensitive instrument that captures every nuance of your playing.

• Dynamic Range: It responds beautifully to your picking technique—shifting effortlessly from smooth, compressed tones to aggressive, raw growl. It has an incredible "holding power" that never breaks up, no matter how hard you play.

• Clarity: Every note is articulate and clear, making it ideal for fast passages and complex phrases. The string-to-string balance is impeccable across all four strings.

• Maple Fretboard: The Maple board adds a snappy, bright attack that complements the punchy PJ pickup configuration perfectly.

A True Player's Bass:

While it is easy to play due to its superior construction, its extreme sensitivity allows for a deep level of mastery. The more you play it, the more you discover the endless tonal possibilities it offers.

Specifications:

• Brand: Provision Guitar (Hand-built in Yamaguchi, Japan)

• Configuration: PJ

• Fingerboard: Maple

• Neck Condition: Straight, Low Action, ~100% Truss Rod life remaining

item.title: 2025 Mint Warrior Dran Michael loaded - Amazing bass — $4,000
item.description:
$4,000 · Mint · Shane's Gear Outlet


I have this listed on Facebook groups without fees so it should go anytime.


One of the basses built by the Legend JD right before he got sick and passed away. This bass is as good as it gets with build, playabilty and tone for days. It is loaded up and used as my main bass for the last 5 months in church. Comes from a smoke free home and is babied and kept like new. This bass would cost you close to $7900 and 6 months to build.I added a video demo of this bass in a full band mix using just a DI box for the tone.


Aged Aldar body

Spalted Maple top and headstock

Blue Burst with Poly finish on Body and headstock

34 scale

8.4 pounds

18mm spacing

2025 Warrior Big Bottom Preamp

USA Bartolini pickups

D-Cline Designs Custom matching knobs

Ebony Fretboard with Abalone Block inlays and sword

Heavy Duty Gigbag

Letter of Authenticity

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass Squier Series 1995 - Red — $499
item.description:
$499 · Excellent · David's Gear Bizarre

This Fender Squier Series Jazz Bass is in excellent condition with the exception one very tiny chip out of the fretboard at the first fret, too small to photograph. It comes in a hardshell case.

item.title: Martin EB-18 1979–1982 - Natural — $1,250
item.description:
$1,250 · Very Good · Ron’s Rock Shop

Up for sale is a vintage Martin EB-18 4-string electric bass guitar in very good cosmetic and structural condition. Featuring Martin's classic natural wood, neck-through-body construction with running stripes, this instrument is structurally rock-solid, plays beautifully, and looks excellent for its age.

Please note that this bass has been modified from its stock configuration to be a highly versatile "player's instrument":

  • Upgraded Bridge: The original bridge has been replaced with a vintage Leo Quan Badass® bridge for improved sustain and precise intonation.
  • Added Bridge Pickup: The body has been routed to accommodate an additional single-coil/J-style bridge pickup alongside the original neck humbucker, controlled by an added mini-toggle switch.

The finish shows minor, honest cosmetic wear consistent with age, but no major damage. It comes resting in the hard case pictured.

item.title: G&L USA Climax Bass - 1994 - Honeyburst — $1,195
item.description:
$1,195 · Excellent · Luke's Guitar Shop

This is 1994 American made G&L climax bass. Honeyburst finish over an Ash body with maple neck (1 1/2" nut width), and Indian Rosewood fretboard. Bass has some extremely light surface scratches but I don't see anything that goes through the finish and it is in excellent condition. The frets are in excellent shape and it plays cleanly up and down the neck with good action and no buzzes or issues. The pickup sounds great and the controls work as they should. Guitar is completely stock.  The weight on this one is 9.41 lbs and it comes in a hardshell case. Please let me know if you have any questions. No trade offers please. Thank you!

item.title: Peavey Cirrus - Natural — $600
item.description:
$600 · Fair · Rob's Gear Garage

Body of the bass is in very good shape. No scratches or dings. I replaced the pickups and pre amp and pots out of a Millennium BXP. I still have the original pots and pre amp. Bass works as it should incredibly loud.

item.title: Pre-Owned 2016 Warwick Custom Shop Masterbuilt Corvette $$ Bass Flamed Maple & Bubinga With Gig Bag — $5,999.99
item.description:
$5,999.99 · Very Good · Truetone Music

In the world of special basses, not many compare to a Warwick Custom Shop Masterbuilt piece.  Crafted in Germany by the finest luthiers, anything on this level is sure to blow the minds of even the most seasoned bass aficionados.  What we have here is no exception.  We're excited to present this 2016 Warwick Custom Shop Masterbuilt Corvette $$.

Originally built as a NAMM show piece, this amazing bass made its way to the legendary bass-only shop, The Bass Place in Arizona.  It was in a private collection for the past 10 years, and has now made its way here to Truetone.  Immediately, it stood out as one of the coolest basses we've had here in recent years, perhaps ever.
Right off the bat, you'll notice the woods: the body is made from Swamp Ash, with a flame Maple and Bubinga top.  The natural transparent satin finish shows the grain beautifully.  The flame Maple neck and fretboard also stand - the end result is stunning.  Other premium features that will grab your attention are the custom tuners with wooden pegs, illuminated side dots, the brass nut, and bronze jumbo frets.
Of course it's not just about looks and specs - this Warwick Corvette $$ plays and sounds amazing.  The tone woods chosen are naturally resonant, providing a solid foundation for a powerful bass.  If you like it thick, aggressive, and punchy, this one is for you. It features dual humbucker pickups and an active preamp, giving you deep lows and a clear, harmonically beautiful top end.  This is the sort of bass that has no problem cutting through the mix, heavy amongst slamming drums and thick, distorted guitars.  But, it's also at home for super clean situations.  It's a truly versatile instrument.  
The Corvette $$ is loaded with two MEC humbuckers. Each has its own 3-way switch to give you full tonal control.  Go to series mode for a thick and powerful signal that boosts the low-mid frequencies.  Go to parallel mode for a clearer with more scooped, punchy tone and great high-frequency definition.  And go to single coil mode for mid-heavy tone perfect for fingerstyle playing.  You can play around with all of that to really dial in a sound that is all you, without compromise.
The bottom line is that a Warwick Custom Shop Masterbuilt bass is always going to be special, but one like this takes it to another level.  We can see why Warwick chose to feature it at the 2016 NAMM show.  Thankfully the previous owner kept it in great condition - it's quite clean.  The techs in our shop have setup the bass to play perfectly.  A gig bag is included as is the original owners guide, user kit and paperwork.
We'll be sad to see this one go, and we think it could happen fast, so don't sleep on this one if you're serious about it!
  • Topwood: 1" Special Lamination Top  Flame Maple & Bubinga
  • Backwood: Swamp Ash Back
  • Matched Headstock: Special Lamination and Natural Transparent Satin
  • Nut: Just-A-Nut III Brass
  • Machine heads: Warwick with wooden knobs
  • Neck Wood: Flamed Maple
  • Fretboard: Flamed Maple
  • Side Dots: Illuminated Side Dots
  • Fingerboard Radius: 20"
  • Scale Length: 34" (Long Scale)
  • Fret material & size: 24 Jumbo Bronze (extra hard) frets
  • Frets: IFT - Invisible Fretwork Technology
  • Body Shape: Flat body shape for top & back side
  • Pickups: Passive MEC MM Chrome Pickups
  • Electronics: Active Warwick 2-way electronics w/ rechargeable
  • Lithium Battery (included)
  • Pot layout: Volume P/P/Balance/Treble/Bass
  • Switch: Two 3-way mini-switches
  • Function Switch: separate configuration of the humbuckers (series/parallel/single coil)
  • Bridge system: 2-piece solid Brass Warwick Bridge
  • Strap system: Warwick security locks
  • Color: Natural Satin Finish
  • Hardware Colour: Chrome Hardware
  • Certificate: Individually Issued Certificate of Authenticity
  • User Kit: Warwick "Sound of Wood" User Kit
  • User Manual: German and English manuals included

Serial Number: H-162047-16

item.title: Vintage Fender P-J Bass 4-String Electric Bass Guitar Silver Jade Made in Japan Factory Kahler Tremolo Bridge Active EMG Pickups 1985-1986 — $1,699
item.description:
$1,699 · Good · Metro Gnome Music

Up for sale is a vintage Fender P-J electric bass guitar. This one was just checked out in our store and is ready to play. It has newer D'addario round wound strings on it. The bass is pretty rare, as we haven't seen one in our 26 years in business. It has a factory installed Kahler tremolo bridge and a Silver Jade Finish on the body. At some point in its life, this bass had the original passive pickups exchanged for EMG active ones. One of our guys believes that the bass was set up with shims in the neck pocket from the factory to compensate for the tremolo bridge. It does have two shims in the neck pocket (one of them is visible even when the guitar is put together). The neck is nice and straight, but this is one of those Fender basses where the neck has to come off to adjust the truss rod. The bass was made in Japan in the mid 1980's, 1985-1986, serial number A002039. It includes a tremolo bar, but a case is not included. Check out the pictures for the condition. I have a few more pictures, but Reverb limits me to 25, so if you need to see something, let me know, and I can message you.

item.title: Dingwall ABZ 5 String - Sonic Blue — $3,670.51
item.description:
$3,670.51 · Brand New · Wentworth Music

ABZ 5 String

Body:Swamp Ash

Neck:5 piece maple

Fretboard:Pau Ferro

Finish:Sonic Blue

Top coat: Matte

Headstock finish:non-matching

Headstock inlay: Black period

Fretboard inlay: treble side 3mm dots

Side markets:white pearloid

Preamp: Rupert Neve Design with 2 band master tone

Pickups: 2 x FBV

Rotary: x 2

Bridge: minimalist

Includes gigbag w/ticbag and wrench kit

item.title: 1971-1973 Gibson Les Paul Bass - Natural/Mahogany — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Good · Ron’s Rock Shop

Up for sale is a vintage, early-1970s Gibson Les Paul Triumph Bass in its original Natural mahogany finish. Based on the serial number (173943) and physical features, this instrument dates between 1971 and 1973.

Condition & Functionality:

  • Functional Condition: The bass is in good, fully functional working order. The low-impedance pickups and the complex on-board control plate (including the Hi/Lo output transformer, phase switch, and tone selectors) all work as they should.
  • Cosmetic Condition: The bass shows honest play wear consistent with its age, including a few marks, scuffs, and dings throughout the body and neck.
  • Note on Control Plate: Please note that the black plastic control plate has a small crack around one of the mounting screws. It is stable but worth noting for transparency.

Local Pickup only. Please feel free to message me with any questions or to arrange a time to check out the bass. Includes hardshell case.

item.title: Dunable USA Custom Shop R2 VI - Black 25667 — $3,660
item.description:
$3,660 · Brand New · The Guitar Store at Quimper Sound Records

This brutal Dunable USA Custom Shop R2 VI just made its way into Quimper Sound Guitars! the 30.75" Scale length, Bass Strings, and Baphomet pickups ensure a ground-shaking, window breaking masterpiece. All the roaring low end you will ever need, conveniently available in this 6 stringer. This is the perfect tool for when a baritone still isn't low enough and you need to explode a little louder than a normal bass. A classic wood selection, extremely simple controls, and high quality hardware yield an extremely reliable instrument.

Weight: 7.75 lbs

Model R2 VI Serial # 25667 Orientation RH Strings 6 Scale Length 30.75 Body Wood mahogany Neck Wood maple Fingerboard Wood Ebony Frets jumbo stainless frets Inlay silver dash Side Dots luminlay Nut black Finish Type satin nitrocellulose lacquer Finish Color black Hardware Color aged nickel Pickguard black 1 ply Bridge hipshot TOM/stop Tuners Graph Tech Ratio Pickups baphomet Vol/Tone Controls 1 vol 1 tone Other Controls 3 way pup selector

item.title: J&A scroll 2026 - oil — $2,737
item.description:
$2,737 · Excellent · Joseph bass

Scroll rainbow 4

34" 24 frets

This peace of art is made of

body back ,maple ,black walnut.

Top is laminated woods ( zebrano,wenge,padauk,pruplehearth , wlanut black, figured maple)

Neck is laminated wenge padauk maple with flamed maple fretboard woth wood block inlays.

Modern D-C mix type of shape neck very comfortable to play

Neck is jazz bass dimensions 38mm nut 64 mm at 24 fret, 21mm thick om 1 frets 23.5mm on 12 fret

Ultrathin body 37mm

Balanced perfect and weight 3.7kg

Emg pickups dc and preamp

Hipshot and gotoh hardware.

Strings steel 100 80 60 40 warwick

Shiped with bag.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1962 - Natural - Refin — $8,950
item.description:
$8,950 · Very Good · Southside Guitars

This Fender Jazz Bass was made in the USA in 1962. It has been refinished. This neck is dated March 62 and it has a slab rosewood fretboard. The pickups have been changed to Duncans. The pots, tuners, and knobs are also not original. The pickguard and hardware are original. It has been pro-setup in our store and is in great playing condition. It comes with a non original hard case.

item.title: Fender American Standard jazz 2013 - Sunburst — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Excellent · Tim's Gear Bazaar

Here is a beautiful American Standard Fender Jazz bass in excellent condition! The bass plays and sounds just like a Fender should! It’s been professionally setup and it’s right on point! The neck has a really nice gloss finish on it with beautiful wood grain showing! The cream/pearl/cream pickgaurd looks fantastic! It weighs in at 9 pounds and 4 ounces! It comes with the deluxe Fender case in excellent condition too! I’ll only ship within the USA. Thanks

item.title: GB 4 Short Scale Forest Green Cort — $358.56
item.description:
$358.56 · Brand New · SonoVente

Guitare basse Cort GB Short ScaleForest Green, modèle courte échelle, coloris Forest Green (vert), corps en peuplier, manche en érable torréfié, micro humbucker, préampli Markbass.

item.description:

Guitare basse Cort GB Short Scale Fandago Purple, modèle courte échelle, coloris Fandago Purple (violet), corps en peuplier, manche en érable torréfié, micro humbucker, préampli Markbass.

item.title: Fender Meteora 2025 - Sunburst — $575
item.description:
$575 · Good · Don’s Gear Locker

2025 Fender Meteora Bass in Sunburst Finish. Weights about 8 1/4 pounds. Bought last year and never played. Stamped as used on back of headstock. Not sure why. No marks or anything that I can see. Fully tested for listing, everything works 100%. Zero fretwear, still has plastic on the guard. Punchy 18Volt active/passive system. Easy change battery compartment, High Mass Bridge. No bag or case, but is securely pack for shipment. Ready to go as always. Priced to sell. Since it is packed up no other pictures are available. Listing is open to the US Lower 48 Only! NO INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING! Sorry.

item.title: Beautiful FENDER AERODYNE SPECIAL PRECISION BASS – 2022/23 (made in Japan) — $850
item.description:
$850 · Excellent · Paul's Gear Locker

FENDER AERODYNE SPECIAL PRECISION BASS – 2022/23 (made in Japan)

Description: “The Aerodyne Special Series offers a contemporary take on classic Fender® designs. Distinctive aerodynamic lines, custom voiced pickups, state-of-the-art hardware, dazzling finishes, and unmistakable silhouettes combine to create instruments that are pure, purposeful, instantly familiar and radically new. It features a sleek new look with vibrant colors adorning the elegantly bound basswood body and the matching headcap. A modern "C" shape satin finished neck with 12" radius fingerboard ensures effortless playability, while newly designed vintage-voiced Precision Bass pickups and a Babicz® Z-Series FCH-4 bridge deliver a perfect balance of high-performance and classic Fender tone. The made-in-Japan Aerodyne Special Precision Bass® inspires with futuristic style, premium appointments and exceptional tone. The bold and original designs that inspired generations live on in the Aerodyne Special series.”

Features

  • Slim Aerodyne basswood body with bound carved top, Hot Rod Burst finish
  • Modern C shape maple neck with 12" radius maple fingerboard, 20 frets
  • Matching painted headcap
  • New Aerodyne Special pickups
  • Babicz® FCH bridge
  • Weight – 8 pounds, 8 ounces
  • Deluxe Fender gig bag

This is a beautiful bass set up to play well with new D’Addario Chromes flatwound strings. I have used it only in church a few times. Other than a very few tiny dents and fine scratches in the clearcoat, it is in immaculate condition. I’m only selling to finance another purchase.

item.title: Gibson Les Paul Triumph Bass 1971 - 1979 - Walnut — $2,428
item.description:
$2,428 · Very Good · Michael's Gear Locker

Everything works and plays nice. Its old but in great shape. If you have any questions feel free to ask.

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V5 24 Fret Bass, Maple Fretboard, Vintage White — $620
item.description:
$620 · Excellent · Brian's Guitars

Like new condition. Small mark on back of body, bass side (slightly visible in picture) from storage. Local pick up only. Thanks!

item.title: Ibanez BTB845CBL Standard 5-String Bass Guitar - Cerulean Blue Burst Low Gloss — $2,299.99
item.description:
$2,299.99 · Brand New · Campos Music and Supplies

DISCONTINUED MODEL / MODELO DESCATALOGADO

BRAND NEW - SHIPPED IN BRAND NEW IN BOX

Specifications:

  • EQ: Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/ 3-way Mid frequency switch
  • String Type: Steel
  • Body Type: Okoume Wing body
  • Color: Cerulean Blue Burst Low Gloss
  • Strings: 5
  • Material: Poplar Burl topAsh/Okoume wing body
  • Pickup: Bartolini® BH2 neck pickup Passive
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Includes: N/A

Designed for the rich, articulate sound preferred in Sierreño, Norteño, Tejano, and Regional Mexican music.

item.title: Copper Orange Metallic Over Paisley Relic 5-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $698.76
item.description:
$698.76 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars

The DEB5 is a 5-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a Copper Orange Metallic Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


The Tech Features

Body

Body Material: Mahogany

Body Finish: Paisley Relic

Body Paint: Nitro

Body Construction: Solid

Neck

Neck Material: Roasted Maple

Neck Construction: One-Piece

Neck Joint: Bolt-On

Neck Finish: Satin

Neck Shape: C-shape

Scale Length: 864mm / 34"

Fretboard Material: Rosewood

Fretboard Radius: 350mm

Number of Frets: 20 Frets

Fret Material: Stainless Steel

Fret Size: Medium Jumbo

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 45mm

Position Inlays: Block Inlays

Binding: N/A

Side Dots: Glow in the Dark

Truss Rod: Dual Action 2-Way

Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Middle Pickup: N/A

Neck Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Switching: N/A

Configuration: SS

Special Electronics: 3-Band EQ

Hardware

Bridge: Hardtail

Hardware Finish: Chrome

Machine Heads: Chrome Open-Geared Clover-Style

Pickguard: Transparent

Miscellaneous/Special Features

Strings: 45-130


Accessories

Included Accessories:  Truss Rod Adjustment Key, Bridge Adjustment Key, Strap Locks

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505-SWL Wine Red--Fretless Conversion — $1,370
item.description:
$1,370 · Very Good · The Sonic Turtle: Purveyor of Instruments & Pro Audio Equipment

Selling a very lovely Ibanez 5-string bass that is just a bit more than I can chew. Realized I'm a 'two-knob only' kinda guy, so here we are.

This has been converted to a lined fretless, & it looks, feels, plays, & sounds fantastic. Easily one of the best basses I've ever handled, & I've owned several vintage Fenders [an old Elite II that I still regret selling...] & had the good fortune to futz around with some Foderas & the like.

The electronics are great, & the Nordstrand pickups are delightful. I play more funk & rock, but I'm confident these could wrangle just about whatever tone anyone would want; I'm even more certain this would be an end-game bass for anyone playing contemporary jazz [with an electric, of course]. The neck is extremely comfortable, & the finger board too--they both slide like butter, in the best of ways.

Just had this given a clean bill of health from a highly reputable local tech. Action lowered slightly [I prefer mine slightly higher--I lowered it to sell]; New strings [D'Addario XL Chromes Flat-Wound strings, 45 • 65 • 80 • 100 • 132]; everything looks, feels, & sounds like it should. It's just a bloody fantastic bass.

Grab it while you can!

Asking $1370 -- shipping only within the continental US; no international buyers, please -- serious offers only will be considered.

item.title: Copper Orange Metallic Over Paisley Relic 5-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $699
item.description:
$699 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars USA

The DEB5 is a 5-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a Copper Orange Metallic Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


The Tech Features

Body

Body Material: Mahogany

Body Finish: Paisley Relic

Body Paint: Nitro

Neck

Switching: N/A

Configuration: SS

item.title: Warwick Rockbass Streamer Standard 4 2010s - Burgundy Red Transparent — $693
item.description:
$693 · Excellent · The Bass Channel

Used only a couple times for a demo video. Mint and 100% stock. Ships in non-original bag. Thanks for looking!

item.title: Yamaha TRBX304 4-String Bass 2010s - Pewter — $237
item.description:
$237 · Good · KDs Garage

Yamaha bass on very good shape and works perfectly. Active bass so requires a battery to be put into the back cavity.


This bass is missing its knobs. They kept falling off and so I decided to keep them off. No functionality problems.


Comes with hard case.

item.title: 1990s Mosrite ‘65 Reissue Bass The Ventures Sunburst MIJ Japan — $1,895
item.description:
$1,895 · Very Good · PTD Vintage

Worldwide Shipping!

This Mosrite Ventures Bass is a Fantastic axe in great condition. A high-quality, MIJ build ca. 1990s, this ‘65 reissue has a straight neck with comfy quick action. The neck is NOT repaired or cracked in any way whatsoever. It is simply the natural grain of the wood! The electronics are functioning and the bass delivers outstanding tone. Nothing but fun in the sun.

Cosmetically the bass is in great shape. Nicks, dings, scratches, scuffs and patina abound but overall quite clean. Super handsome and surfy in sunburst. Included is a gig bag.


Free local pick up from PTD Vintage in Chicago’s Wicker Park neighborhood available and encouraged. Packed and shipped with care for a flat $125 in the lower 48.

item.title: Ibanez MDM1606 2026 - Burl Natural — $1,499
item.description:
$1,499 · Excellent · Fat Owl guitars

Here is a custom modified Ibanez mdm1606.

I installed EMG E6W pickups and a Taurus TM2. The 3 band preamp has presence and punch mini toggles and active passive mode with push/ pull volume control. This bass plays super nice and low with a great Low b string. Custom wood rear cover.

Amazing bass now even better with upgrades that really make it special.

Truss rod on these are tight but perfectly functional. It's just common with this series. Frets are stainless and excellent. Great tuning stability.

item.title: McGrath Sledgehammer 2025 - Pool Blue — $1,499
item.description:
$1,499 · Excellent · The Bass Channel

Custom made 1-of-1 bass. This bass is called the Sledgehammer. Custom made for The Bass Channel and prominently featured at NAMM 2026, the Sledgehammer is built on McGrath's Thumper base which is a short scale bass featuring 1 neck humbucker and 1 P pickup, in this case, an EMG TBHZ and PHZ respectively. Where the Sledgehammer is unique is that it is tuned BEAD but an octave up from traditional BEAD tuning (close to tenor tuning) using the middle 4 strings of a La Bella Bass VI set. An MXR Bass Octave Deluxe is built in which gives you synthy tones shifted back down to the typical bass register. The Bass feature a 3-way toggle switch and master tone in addition to the octave controls. Victor Wooten, Bob Glaub, and Nate Navarro all played this bass at the NAMM show and loved it. Other specs include. Dunlop Staploks, Badass Bridge, Badass Tuners, and Hipshot String Retainer. Check out the video to hear the tones this bass can make. Not an easy sell but some other obligations have come up and unfortunately for me, this one has to go. Will ship in a gig bag. Thank you for looking!

item.title: Ibanez SR5005 SR Prestige Series 5-String Electric Bass Guitar - Wenge Oil — $3,499.99
item.description:
$3,499.99 · Brand New · Campos Music and Supplies

DISCONTINUED MODEL / MODELO DESCATALOGADO

BRAND NEW - SHIPPED IN BRAND NEW IN BOX

Specifications:

  • Preamp: Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/ EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot) & 3-way Mid frequency switch
  • String Type: Steel
  • Body Type: Poplar body
  • Color: Wenge Oil
  • Strings: 5
  • Material: Wenge top / Wenge back / African Mahogany body
  • Pickup: Bartolini® Custom pickup Passive
  • Left-/Right-handed: Right-handed
  • Includes: N/A

Designed for the rich, articulate sound preferred in Sierreño, Norteño, Tejano, and Regional Mexican music.

item.title: Ibanez SR5A250 SR Premium 5-String Electric Bass with Bag Anniversary Edition 2026 — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Total Entertainment Music Store/Musicauthority

We are an authorized Ibanez dealer

Total Entertainment

501 West International Speedway Blvd

Daytona Beach FL 32114


In honor of the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States, Ibanez is proud to unveil an exciting collection of limited-edition instruments designed to celebrate this momentous occasion. This exclusive collection includes a variety of electric guitars, basses, and premium acoustic instruments, all featuring custom finishes showcasing the iconic red, white, and blue.

Atlas 5pc Panga Panga/Purpleheart Neck

The Atlas 5pc Panga Panga/Purpleheart neck provides a well-balanced note attack and tone with rich sustain.The neck is constructed with KTS TITANIUM reinforcement rods, increasing its stability and adding sustain.

Panga Panga Fretboard

Panga Panga features a beautiful wood grain which produces a tight low and mid range, along with a sharp attack on high end.

Medium Frets with Premium Fret Edge Treatment

Medium sized frets enhances the accuracy to your notes. The Premium Fret Edge Treatment offers a super smooth, comfortable performance.

African Mahogany Body

African Mahogany body delivers a pleasant brightness and rich sustain.

Nordstrand Big Break Pickups

Nordstrand Big Break pickups cram a meaty split coil into a soapbar-style pickup, producing a full-bodied, powerful, aggressive tonal texture, while still retaining the clarity that's characteristic of single coil tone with noiseless performance.

Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-Band EQ

The Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ is our latest refinement on the concept of simple, straightforward, no-nonsense EQ control. The Boost and Cut for the Mid Control are each centered on slightly different frequencies, an innovation that delivers a preset range of the most favorable bass tones.

Gotoh Machine Heads

Gotoh machine heads provide superior precision, a smooth feel, and excellent tuning accuracy.

MR5S Bridge

The MR5S bridge has adjustable saddles for variable string spacing by +/- 1.5mm, answering every bassist’s specific string spacing needs.

EQ Bypass Switch (Passive Tone Control on Treble Pot)

The EQ bypass control offers precision tonal adjustments, including a switch to choose passive-only operation. When the EQ bypass is activated, the treble tone control knob becomes the global tone control for the passive circuit.

3-way Mid Frequency Switch

The 3-way Mid frequency switch allows players to choose from 3 Mid Frequency options and provides great tonal variety.

Gig Bag Included

It comes with Ibanez gig bag which is designed specifically to fit and protect this instrument.

item.title: Fender Kingman Bass SCE Acoustic-Electric Bass 2010s - Natural — $290
item.description:
$290 · Fair · Abelitos gear

BATTERY HOLDER SNAPPED

Other than that still works good!

item.title: Ibanez SR1000EFM-NTF Prestige Soundgear 2005 - 2008 - Natural Flat — $1,175
item.description:
$1,175 · Excellent · Elle's Gear Garage

2007 Ibanez SR1000EFM Prestige Bass – Natural Flat – Excellent Condition – Original Prestige Case Included

2007 Ibanez SR1000EFM Prestige 4-string bass in the highly sought-after Natural Flat finish. This bass is in excellent condition and has been extremely well cared for throughout its life.

The SR1000EFM represents some of the best craftsmanship from Ibanez’s Prestige-era Soundgear lineup, featuring a beautiful flamed maple top, neck-through construction, premium hardware, and the fast, comfortable SR neck profile that players love. It is lightweight, incredibly easy to play, and delivers a huge range of tones suitable for everything from jazz and funk to rock, metal, and modern worship music.

Features include:
• Stunning Natural Flat flamed maple top
• Neck-through construction for exceptional sustain and stability
• Bartolini pickups with active electronics
• 3-band EQ with sweepable mids for extensive tonal shaping
• Mono-Rail bridge system for improved string separation and resonance
• Premium Prestige craftsmanship throughout
• Lightweight and comfortable Soundgear body design

The bass plays beautifully with a straight neck, low action, and fully functional electronics. It is ready for the studio, stage, or collection.

Included is the original Ibanez Prestige hard case featuring the factory velvet-lined interior. The case is in mint condition and has done an excellent job protecting the instrument over the years.

These mid-2000s Prestige Soundgear models don’t come up for sale very often, especially in the Natural Flat finish and with the original case included. If you’ve been looking for a high-end Ibanez bass that delivers boutique-level playability and versatility without the boutique price tag, this is an excellent example.

Please review all photos carefully for exact cosmetic condition and feel free to reach out with any questions or requests for additional pictures.

Thanks for looking!

item.title: Fender Kingman bass — $460
item.description:
$460 · Very Good · Abelitos gear

Only been used for 4 gigs !

item.title: RARE MOURADIAN CS-74 BASS #12 OF 25 - BLUE SPARKLE — $9,995
item.description:
$9,995 · Very Good · Boston Guitar

MOURADIAN CS-74 BASS #12 OF 25 - BLUE SPARKLE
EXTREMELY RARE - ONLY 25 MADE! CHRIS SQUIRE (PROGRESSIVE ROCK LEGENDS YES) SIGNATURE BASS!! ALSO FAVORED BY PAT BADGER OF EXTREME!!

BUILT BY THE LEGENDARY, LATE JIM MOURADIAN, #12 FEATURES A 34" SCALE, SOLID BODY CONSTRUCTION, 2 JOE BARDEN PICKUPS UNDER "MOURADIAN" BRANDED PICKUP COVERS, EBONOL FINGERBOARD WITH DOTS, SPERZEL GERMAN TUNERS, NECK THROUGH WITH TRUSS ROD ADJUSTMENT UNDER THE NECK PICKUP. 

A masterpiece of innovation and craftsmanship, the Mouradian CS-74 Bass Guitar stands out in the world of electric basses. Renowned for its distinctive design and exceptional sound quality, this bass guitar is the result of meticulous engineering and a passion for music. The CS-74 is crafted with a solid body that delivers a robust and resonant tone, making it a reliable choice for both studio sessions and live performances. 

The unique body shape not only offers a visually striking appearance but also ensures comfortable playability, allowing musicians to perform with ease. Equipped with high-output pickups, the CS-74 provides a rich and articulate sound that can cut through any mix, making it suitable for a wide range of musical styles. The smooth neck profile and carefully selected tonewoods contribute to its dynamic sound and effortless playability. 

Ideal for both seasoned players and those seeking to elevate their musical journey, the Mouradian CS-74 Bass Guitar combines tradition with modern enhancements, offering a versatile instrument that responds to the demands of any bass player. Whether you're laying down the groove in a jazz ensemble or rocking out on stage, this bass is designed to meet the high standards of today's musicians.

Key Features:

  • Solid body construction for enhanced resonance
  • High-output pickups for a rich and articulate sound
  • Unique ergonomic body shape for superior comfort
  • Smooth neck profile for effortless playability
  • Versatile tone suitable for various musical styles
  • Precision engineering and craftsmanship
  • Hardshell case included

item.title: Ibanez MDM1300NAB MDM 4str Electric Bass w/Bag - Natural Stained Amber Burst — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Focus Pro Audio

The Ibanez MDM1300 4-String Electric Bass is part of the Mode Series, a modern reimagining of an iconic bass design built for today’s innovative players. Featuring a modified Ash body, a fast Roasted Maple neck, and a highly advanced electronics system, this model delivers outstanding tonal versatility, comfort, and stage-ready performance. From traditional low-end support to technical modern bass lines, the MDM1300 is engineered to excel in any musical setting while offering a sleek, contemporary aesthetic in Natural Stained Amber Burst.

Super All Access Neck Joint

Designed with a deeply contoured heel for smooth, ergonomic access to all 24 frets.

Roasted Maple Neck

A thin C-profile neck with rounded edges provides fast, comfortable playability and enhanced stability.

Roasted Maple Fretboard

Heat-treated for balanced attack, rich sustain, and a smooth, curved edge for superior grip comfort.

Medium Stainless Steel Frets

Offer snappy response, clean bends, and long-term durability.

Luminescent Side Dots

Glow-in-the-dark markers ensure clear visibility on dim stages.

Ash Body

Delivers bright, punchy tone with strong clarity and sustain. The stained grain provides a bold, modern appearance.

Delta S4J Pickups

Hum-canceling single-coils that deliver aggressive yet balanced tone across all frequencies, designed to cut through any mix.

Ibanez Sonitech S Preamp (3-band EQ)

Provides a wide range of tonal control with Master Volume, Balancer, Master Tone (active/passive), 3-band EQ, EQ bypass, and a 3-way mid-frequency switch.

Hexa Mid System

Rear-mounted switch offering six selectable mid-frequency points for maximum tonal flexibility.

Ibanez Aero-light Machine Heads

Lightweight yet durable tuners made with Extra Super Duralumin for reliable tuning stability.

MR5S Mono-rail Bridge

Enhances note clarity and sustain with independent saddles and adjustable string spacing (19mm for 4-string models).

Detachable Finger Ramp

Included to support faster, more controlled fingerstyle playing.

Gig Bag Included

Comes with an Ibanez gig bag designed to protect and fit the instrument perfectly.

item.title: Ibanez MDM1005MAM MDM 5str Electric Bass w/Bag - Midnight Arctic Ocean Matte — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Brand New · Focus Pro Audio

The Ibanez MDM1005MAM is a modern 5-string electric bass crafted for players who want advanced comfort, tonal flexibility, and premium performance. Part of the Ibanez Mode Series, it blends the familiar feel of a classic bass with contemporary upgrades that support both traditional grooves and highly technical playing styles. The modified body shape and Super All Access neck joint provide excellent ergonomics and easy access to all 24 frets, while the Alder body and Rosewood fretboard deliver a balanced, resonant tone suited for many genres. Equipped with Delta S5J pickups and the Sonitech S preamp, this bass offers detailed tone shaping, strong articulation, and noise-free clarity for any musical setting. Additional premium components such as the MR5S bridge and Aero-light tuners enhance tuning stability, sustain, and overall performance. A gig bag is included.

Super All Access Neck Joint

Provides a highly contoured and ergonomic heel shape, allowing smooth reach to all 24 frets and comfortable upper-fret playability.

Roasted Maple Neck

A 1-piece roasted maple design ensures stability, a fast feel, and an attractive natural appearance.

Thin C-Profile Neck Shape

Offers fast, comfortable playability suitable for modern techniques and long performances.

Rounded Fretboard Edges

Adds a smoother, more comfortable feel along the neck for enhanced playing comfort.

Rosewood Fretboard

Produces a balanced tone with warmth and focused midrange presence.

Medium Stainless Steel Frets

Delivers bright, snappy response with excellent durability and smooth bends.

Luminescent Side Dot Markers

Helps players maintain visual orientation during low-light performances.

Alder Body

Provides a bright, well-balanced tonal foundation with rich resonance and sustain.

Delta S5J Pickups

Hum-canceling single-coil pickups that offer an aggressive yet balanced tone across all frequencies while reducing noise.

Ibanez Sonitech S Preamp

A highly flexible onboard preamp with master volume, balancer, master tone, 3-band EQ, EQ bypass, and a 3-way mid-frequency switch for versatile tone shaping.

Hexa Mid System (2-way)

Located on the back of the bass, this system provides six selectable mid-frequency options for deeper tonal customization.

MR5S Mono-Rail Bridge

Maximizes string-to-body vibration transfer, increasing clarity and sustain. Offers adjustable 18mm string spacing.

Ibanez Aero-light Machine Heads

Lightweight yet durable tuners made with Extra Super Duralumin improve balance and tuning stability.

Transparent Pickguard

Adds a modern aesthetic while preserving the visual appeal of the body finish.

Included Gig Bag

Provides convenient protection and portability for the instrument.

item.title: Ibanez MDM1000PW MDM 4str Electric Bass w/Bag - Pearl White — $1,199.99
item.description:
$1,199.99 · Brand New · Focus Pro Audio

The Ibanez MDM1000PW is a 4-string electric bass from the Mode Series, blending classic bass design with modern innovations. Crafted for versatile playing styles, it features an alder body, a 1-piece roasted maple neck, and a rosewood fretboard, providing a rich, balanced tone. Its Super All Access neck joint and ergonomic C-profile neck ensure smooth playability and easy access to all 24 frets.

Equipped with Delta S4J pickups and the Ibanez Sonitech S preamp, it offers exceptional tonal versatility, including a 3-band EQ, EQ bypass switch, and 3-way mid-frequency Hexa system. The MR5S mono-rail bridge ensures clarity and sustain, while lightweight Aero-light tuners offer precise tuning stability. Finished in Pearl White and including a gig bag, the MDM1000PW is ideal for bassists seeking professional sound and performance.

Alder Body:

Provides a bright, well-balanced tone with rich resonance and sustain.

1-Piece Roasted Maple Neck:

Thin C-profile neck offers fast, comfortable playability with extreme stability and a visually rich finish.

Rosewood Fretboard:

Delivers a solid, focused midrange tone.

Medium Stainless Steel Frets:

Ensures snappy tonal response, clean bends, and long-term durability.

Super All Access Neck Joint:

Ergonomic design allows smooth access to all 24 frets.

Luminescent Side Dot Markers:

Offer clear fretboard guidance for dark stage environments.

Delta S4J Pickups:

Aggressive yet balanced single-coil tone with hum-canceling design for clarity and noise reduction.

Ibanez Sonitech S Preamp 3-Band EQ:

Comprehensive tonal control, including master volume, balancer, master tone, bass, middle, treble, EQ bypass switch, and 3-way mid-frequency Hexa system.

MR5S Mono-Rail Bridge:

Transfers string vibration efficiently, enhances sustain and clarity, with adjustable string spacing.

Ibanez Aero-Light Tuners:

Lightweight, durable tuners for precise tuning stability.

Included Gig Bag:

Custom-fitted for safe transport and protection.

item.title: ESP LTD Surveyor-204DX 4-Strings Right-Hand Electric Bass Guitar (Black Burst) — $549
item.description:
$549 · Brand New · Focus Pro Audio

The LTD Surveyor-204DX takes a classic ESP bass shape and offers it with great LTD quality and high value. Built with bolt-on construction at 34” scale, the Surveyor-204DX includes a lightweight, resonant poplar body with a burled poplar top, imparting a superbly unique look with the knots and figured wood grain showing through the transparent finish. It features a smooth and comfortable roasted maple neck with rosewood fingerboard, dot inlays, and 21 extra-jumbo frets. Components on the Surveyor-204DX include black hardware, LTD vintage tuners, an LTD DB-4 fixed bridge, controls for volume, balance, and tone boost, and a set of ESP LJB (bridge) and LPD (neck) pickups.
